title: Lead SEO Specialist at Zebronics South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Zebronics South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Zebronics South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zebronics South Asia Partners:
Zebronics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics South Asia Partners!
